## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Tested manually in the browser
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or a clear reason is given below)
- [ ] Change is scoped to a single concern
- [ ] Stack constraints respected — React 18 / Vite / Express / TypeScript, local-only tool (no hosting, auth systems, or deployment config)
